holdings.infoBox: ECON is an equity ETF with a total of 368 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 9.11%, Samsung Electronics at 6.21%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 4.55%, MediaTek at 3.21%, and Delta Electronics at 2.06%.

overview.description: The Columbia Research Enhanced Emerging Economies ETF (ECON) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and midcap equities from emerging markets. The fund aims to achieve stronger total return versus broad emerging market by selecting components based on favorable fundamental criteria and weighting by market-cap. ECON was launched on Sep 14, 2010 and is issued by Columbia Threadneedle.
